last_prompt: Research and design GitHub Issues integration for wreck-it. The feature should optionally create a GitHub Issue when a task starts (InProgress) and close it when the task completes or fails. Review the existing CLI config (cli/src/types.rs Config struct), the project_api.rs and agent_memory.rs files, and the GitHub REST API for issue creation/closure. Design: (1) new Config fields `github_issues_enabled: bool`, `github_repo: Option<String>` (owner/repo), `github_token: Option<String>` (falls back to GITHUB_TOKEN env var), (2) a minimal GitHub API client in cli/src/github_client.rs using reqwest, (3) the label strategy (add a `wreck-it` label, use task id as issue title prefix). Document the design.
